Jessica Martinez
Phoenix, AZ

Summary:
Dedicated and detail-oriented warehouse professional with over 5 years of experience in fast-paced environments. Proven ability to efficiently pick and pack orders while maintaining high standards of accuracy. Comfortable standing for extended periods and lifting heavy items. Committed to contributing to team success and ensuring customer satisfaction.

Experience:

Warehouse Associate
ABC Logistics, Phoenix, AZ  
June 2021 - Present  
- Efficiently picked and packed orders for shipment, maintaining an accuracy rate of 98%.
- Operated warehouse equipment including pallet jacks and hand trucks to move merchandise.
- Maintained organization in the packing area, ensuring timely processing of incoming and outgoing shipments.
- Collaborated with team members to meet daily shipping quotas in a high-pressure environment.

Order Picker
XYZ Distribution, Tempe, AZ  
March 2018 - May 2021  
- Selected items from inventory and accurately packed them for delivery, achieving a 95% order accuracy rate.
- Worked in a fast-paced warehouse environment, managing up to 200 orders daily.
- Assisted in training new employees on picking and packing procedures, promoting a culture of safety and efficiency.

Loader/Unloader
QuickShip Warehousing, Mesa, AZ  
January 2016 - February 2018  
- Loaded and unloaded merchandise from trucks and containers, ensuring items were handled with care.
- Performed inventory checks and reported discrepancies to management, enhancing inventory accuracy.
- Collaborated with team members to streamline processes, reducing loading times by 20%.

Certifications:
- OSHA Forklift Operator Certification  
- CPR and First Aid Certified
